Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output:
Good. Now I have all 5 confirmed pairs. Let me build the joined string and compute the SHA-1:

- Northhollow = 1992-04-17
- Otherwick = 1995-09-22
- Penrith = 2001-02-08
- Quenwick = 2014-11-30
- Riverstone = 2020-06-14

Sorted alphabetically: Northhollow, Otherwick, Penrith, Quenwick, Riverstone ✓

args.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib
s = 'Northhollow=1992-04-17|Otherwick=1995-09-22|Penrith=2001-02-08|Quenwick=2014-11-30|Riverstone=2020-06-14'
print('String:', s)
digest = hashlib.sha1(s.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
print('SHA1:', digest)
"
args.description: Compute SHA-1 of the joined entity=value pairs
